phrases.intent_en: Ask about changing of the guard times
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure a lieu la relève de la garde ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR ah lee-OO lah ruh-LAYV duh lah GARD
phrases.cultural_note: The changing of the guard ceremony takes place every day at 11:55am on the Place du Palais. It's a popular photo opportunity.

responses.english: Every day at 11:55 AM, on the square.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: Tous les jours à onze heures cinquante-cinq, sur la place.

phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter des billets pour la visite du palais ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ah-shuh-TAY day bee-YAY poor lah vee-ZEET doo pah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: Palace tours run daily except when the Prince is in residence. Tickets include access to the State Apartments and the Monaco Museum.

responses.english: At the ticket office on the square. Tours from April to October.
responses.local: Au guichet sur la place. Visites d'avril à octobre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos à l'intérieur du palais ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN PRAHN-druh day FOH-toh ah lan-tay-RYUHR doo pah-LAY
phrases.cultural_note: Photography rules vary by room in the palace. Always check with the guide or look for signs.

responses.english: No, photos are not allowed inside.
responses.phonetic: nohn, lay FOH-toh son an-tair-DEET ah lan-tay-RYUHR
responses.local: Non, les photos sont interdites à l'intérieur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the view from the terraces
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une belle vue depuis les terrasses ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un bel VOO duh-POO lay tah-RASS
phrases.cultural_note: The palace terraces offer panoramic views of Monaco's harbor and the French Riviera coastline — one of the best viewpoints in the Principality.

responses.english: Yes, go up the stairs to the right. Magnificent view.
responses.local: Oui, montez les escaliers à droite. Vue magnifique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Prince's car collection
phrases.text_local: Peut-on voir la collection de voitures du Prince ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN vwar lah koh-lek-SYOHN duh vwah-TOOR doo PRANS
phrases.cultural_note: Prince Albert II's car collection is displayed at the Monaco Top Cars Collection museum near the Fontvieille district — featuring rare vintage models.

responses.english: At the Top Cars museum in Fontvieille, a fifteen-minute walk.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah koh-lek-SYON duh vwah-TUR suh vee-ZEET dahn les-PASS day-dee-AY doo pah-LAY
responses.local: Au musée Top Cars à Fontvieille, à quinze minutes à pied.
